name: 诅咒结界规则
description: 每回合限一次，己方回合受到伤害时免疫并将诅咒交给对手
skillCode: const piece = context.rulePiece; const damageSource = context.sourcePiece; const damageAmount = context.damage; const currentPlayerId = battle.turn.currentPlayerId; const pieceOwnerId = piece.ownerPlayerId; if (currentPlayerId !== pieceOwnerId) return { success: false }; if (!piece.statusTags) piece.statusTags = []; const usedThisTurn = piece.statusTags.find(t => t.type === 'curse-ward-used'); if (usedThisTurn) return { success: false }; piece.statusTags.push({ id: 'curse-ward-used-' + Date.now(), type: 'curse-ward-used', name: '诅咒结界已使用', remainingDuration: 1 }); const opponentPlayer = battle.players.find(p => p.playerId !== pieceOwnerId); if (opponentPlayer) { const curseCardId = 'rafaam-curse-' + Date.now(); if (!battle.customCards) battle.customCards = {}; battle.customCards[curseCardId] = { id: curseCardId, name: '诅咒(' + damageAmount + ')', description: '消耗2AP来打出。当此牌在手牌中时，每个回合结束时对一个随机友方棋子造成' + damageAmount + '点伤害', type: 'active', icon: '💀', actionPointCost: 2, damageAmount: damageAmount, code: 'function executeCard(context) { const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === context.playerId; }); if (!player || player.actionPoints < 2) return { success: false, message: "AP不足" }; player.actionPoints -= 2; return { success: true, message: "弃置了诅咒" }; }' }; addCardToHand(curseCardId, opponentPlayer.playerId); addPlayerRuleById(opponentPlayer.playerId, 'rule-rafaam-curse-end-turn'); } return { success: true, blocked: true, message: piece.name + '的诅咒结界触发，免疫了' + damageAmount + '点伤害并将诅咒交给了对手' };
